faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Piscataway homes commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. Occasionally, residents may also see fishing spiders near the Raritan River and wooded areas. While most local spiders are harmless, our team can identify species and implement targeted control measures to keep your property spider-free.
